title: selinum sinchianum
intro: Selinum sinchianum, also known as Wild Celery or Chinese Celery, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Selinum sinchianum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of hypertension, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant are typically used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
